name: Baked Beef and Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cl Garlic peeled and lightly crushed
3 small Leeks roots trimmed, 1-inch of green left on, cut into 1/4 x 2 inch julienne strips
3 each Carrots cut into 1/4 x 2 inch julienne strips
3 each Celery ribs cut into 1/4 x 2 inch julienne strips
8 each White mushroom caps cut into thin slices
2 cup Shaped pasta cooked until just tender
Salt and fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Place beef, onion, garlic, peppercorns, and broth in an oven-proof casserole.
3. Add water to cover by 1 1/2 inches.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Cover and bake in the oven about 2 hours, until beef is very tender.
6. Remove meat and cool.
7. Shred from bones, discarding any fat and the bones.
8. Cover. Pour broth through a fine mesh strainer into a gravy separator or bowl. Allow to cool.
9. Pour or skim off fat and return defatted broth to the casserole.
10. Add leeks, carrots, celery, shredded beef, mushrooms, pasta, salt, and pepper.
11. Bake, covered, for 5 minutes.
12. Remove from oven and stir in dill and parsley.
13. Serve immediately in deep soup bowls.
